channel.title: I'm Brock DEV
channel.description: Recent content on I'm Brock DEV

item.title: About me
item.description: These are my main projects. You can find all of them on my GitHub page. Iliad API Unofficial An unofficial Iliad REST API. Retrive data as Json response from the official Iliad website. Repository Test

item.title: Contact
item.description: Contact Send me an email to: info@brockdev.it Visit my Github profile: Brock DEV Follow me on Twitter: _ABroccoletti_
